text: v0.6.0 released — standalone distribution support, progressive loading, automatic muting of the launch directory
v0.5.0 released — UI revamp, improved visibility, better navigation
v0.3.0 released — full migration to TypeScript, daemon-CLI separated architecture
v0.2.3 released — interactive features (detail mode, search, filtering)
v0.2.2 released — display color customization (RGB specification support)
v0.1.0 initial release — real-time file change monitoring and TUI display
